other_observers: Ira Sanders; Ira Sanders was the original finder.
specific_location: Between the lower and upper twin ponds at Chico Basin Ranch.
description: Brown head, back and wings. Single white spot at the base of the primaries no other white spots visible. Rufous flanks and a white belly. Size and shape similar to a Spotted Towhee.Behaviors: The bird was first seen on the ground in a weedy area and then flew up to a Russian Olive tree for a few seconds. It then left the area and we could not relocate it.Call: nonePlumage: unknown
